column1: The players spawn point. If there is none, the player spawns at the world origin
Waits the set delay after its ID gets activated, then sends a signal to all objects with the selected Target ID
Wall button. Activates all objects with the same id. Set activate once to 1 to make it a one-time use
When it's ID is activated, teleports any bodies inside of it to the position specified in Telepos
When its ID gets called, starts sending activation signals to the Target ID every X seconds. Stops when its ID gets called again
